projects.name: swellweb/reame
projects.description: A lean, fully-tested LLM inference server for the hardware you already have — free tiers, shared VPS, 2-core ARM boxes. OpenAI-compatible API on llama.cpp. On a CPU, never compute the same thing twice: it caches prompts, prefixes and past generations to disk, so request #100 costs a fraction of request #1.
projects.full_description: A lean, fully-tested LLM inference server for the hardware you already have — free tiers, shared VPS, 2-core ARM boxes. OpenAI-compatible API on llama.cpp. On a CPU, never compute the same thing twice: it caches prompts, prefixes and past generations to disk, so request #100 costs a fraction of request #1.
